creator: Pascal.Stumpf@cubes.de
text:
Update to 0.7rc2.

--- Makefile.old        2010-12-15 21:26:20.000000000 +0100
+++ Makefile    2010-12-15 21:13:02.000000000 +0100
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=      supertuxkart
-PORTVERSION=   0.7rc1
+PORTVERSION=   0.7rc2
 CATEGORIES=    games
 MASTER_SITES=  SF/supertuxkart/SuperTuxKart/0.7
 EXTRACT_SUFX=  -src.tar.bz2

--- distinfo.old        2010-12-15 21:26:40.000000000 +0100
+++ distinfo    2010-12-15 21:15:30.000000000 +0100
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (supertuxkart-0.7rc1-src.tar.bz2) = 
fe77dee4f48cc651f9513b0bb203d5b748abf5c789c4ebb5dea4c3ef8362f01d
-SIZE (supertuxkart-0.7rc1-src.tar.bz2) = 109964784
+SHA256 (supertuxkart-0.7rc2-src.tar.bz2) = 
9bd33b60ec13a89dc53c5252e6bdd029ebcc071ee41c7b2bb0ff11723265bc2a
+SIZE (supertuxkart-0.7rc2-src.tar.bz2) = 110652013
